overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence showing a character with a large backpack traversing a snowy mountain landscape. The character descends from a rocky ridge into a deep snow valley under overcast winter skies, leaving footprints in the fresh powder.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain ridge with patchy snow

events.description: character steps off rocky terrain into deep snow, beginning descent into valley

agents.ego_description: walking carefully down a rocky snow-covered ridge carrying a large backpack with yellow cargo straps

entered.detail: uneven rocky terrain partially covered with snow that the character is traversing
distant mountain peaks covered in snow forming the horizon line
wide valley opening between mountain ranges ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rocky snow-covered mountain ridge with a large backpack. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the edge of the ridge where the terrain drops off into a deep snow field below. Distant snow-capped mountains fill the horizon under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: wading through knee-deep snow down the mountain slope, leaving a trail of footprints

entered.detail: thick blanket of snow covering the valley floor where the character sinks in with each step
steep snow-covered slopes forming the sides of the valley

segments.scene_description: Having left the rocky ridge behind, the character descends into a vast snow-filled valley. The deep snow slows the pace as the character wades forward, with mountain walls rising on either side. The camera continues to follow steadily as the journey continues through the pristine white landscape toward the distant mountain pass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character transitions from a high, rocky mountain ridge down into the depths of a vast, snow-filled valley. It begins by following the character from behind along a rugged, snow-covered crest, moving toward a steep drop-off with distant peaks visible under an overcast sky. As the character leaves the rocky heights behind, the terrain shifts into a deep snow field where the pace slows as they wade through the thick powder. The scene then expands to reveal towering mountain walls rising on either side, guiding the steady forward motion through the pristine white landscape. Finally, the camera continues its pursuit as the character pushes further into the valley toward a distant mountain pass.
